expectations.text: Mentions need for pre-existing PostgreSQL admin user with CREATE ROLE/GRANT privileges
expectations.evidence: "Create a dedicated PostgreSQL user that Infisical will use to create/drop temporary users. This user needs: CREATE ROLE privilege, GRANT and REVOKE privileges, ALTER ROLE"

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Gateway requirement for private VPC access
expectations.evidence: "Since your database is in a private VPC, you must deploy an Infisical Gateway...For your private VPC database, the Infisical Gateway is essential"

expectations.text: Shows correct config fields (host, port, user, password, database name, TTL settings)
expectations.evidence: Configuration table shows all required fields: Host, Port, Username, Password, Database Name, CA (SSL), Gateway, plus Default TTL and Max TTL

expectations.text: Mentions customizable SQL creation statements for least-privilege access
expectations.evidence: "Custom Creation Statement (Optional but Recommended)" section with detailed examples for read-only access, full write access, and application-specific permissions using {{username}}, {{password}}, {{expiration}} templates
"Short TTLs for Maximum Security" section: 'Developers working in IDE: 30m - 1h, Automated jobs/services: 1h - 2h, CI/CD pipelines: 15m - 30m'
"Step 3: Generate and Use Credentials" covers generation, Step 4 covers lease management with Renew, Revoke, and Auto-Expiration
